# Allstar Painting

> Allstar Painting is a residential painting company serving Little Rock, Arkansas. The site is a single-page marketing site describing services, service area, and how to request a quote.

## Business
- Name: Allstar Painting LLC
- Phone: (501) 555-0142
- Service area: Little Rock, Arkansas
- Contact: Call or text (501) 555-0142, or submit the quote form at /#quote

## Services
- Interior painting
- Exterior painting
- Cabinet & trim painting
- Drywall repair & surface prep

## Pages
- [Homepage](index.html): Overview of services, service area, customer reviews, FAQ, and quote request form.
